ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dhbs" (
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DHB */,
  "dhb_name" TEXT /* Name of the DHB */,
  "dhb_code" TEXT /* Code for the DHB */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the DHB was established */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the DHB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination stat */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DHB the stat belongs to */,
  "at_least_partially_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who have received at least one dose */,
  "percent_at_least_partially_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of individuals who have received at least one dose */,
  "fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of fully vaccinated individuals */,
  "percent_fully_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of fully vaccinated individuals */,
  "eligible_for_booster" INTEGER /* Number of individuals eligible for booster shots */,
  "received_booster" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who have received booster shots */,
  "percent_boosted" REAL /* Percentage of individuals who have received booster shots */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination data was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the vaccination data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhbs ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "pop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data point */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DHB the population data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the DHB */,
  "eligible_population" INTEGER /* Number of individuals eligible for vaccination */,
  "age_group_0_14" INTEGER /* Population aged 0-14 */,
  "age_group_15_24" INTEGER /* Population aged 15-24 */,
  "age_group_25_44" INTEGER /* Population aged 25-44 */,
  "age_group_45_64" INTEGER /* Population aged 45-64 */,
  "age_group_65_plus" INTEGER /* Population aged 65 and over */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhbs ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vaccination data */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DHB being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Specific data viewed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhbs ("dhb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dhb_regions" (
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DHB */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the DHB belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dhb_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_types" (
  "vaccination_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination type */,
  "vaccination_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccination type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccination type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data point */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DHB the vaccination data belongs to */,
  "vaccination_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination data */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Number of doses administered */,
  "vaccination_site" TEXT /* Location where the vaccination was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhbs ("dhb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_vaccination_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_type_id") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("vaccination_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination outcome */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DHB the vaccination outcome belongs to */,
  "vaccination_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination outcome */,
  "number_of_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases with the outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., hospitalization, death) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_outcomes_vaccination_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_type_id") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("vaccination_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_outcomes_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhbs ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination batch */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DHB the vaccination batch belongs to */,
  "vaccination_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination type */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccination */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination batch was manufactured */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination batch expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_batches_vaccination_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_type_id") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("vaccination_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_batches_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhbs ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination site */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DHB the vaccination site belongs to */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination site */,
  "site_address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_sites_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhbs ("dhb_id")
)
